ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of trades for the asset */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the asset */,
  "200_day_ma" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the asset */,
  "150_day_ma" REAL /* 150-day moving average of the asset */,
  "50_day_ma" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the asset */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the asset */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* 52-week high price of the asset */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* 52-week low price of the asset */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each row */,
  "pct_change" REAL /* Percentage change in the closing price */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the market data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the prices are quoted */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividends paid on the asset */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio of the asset */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the asset */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the asset */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the asset */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("row_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to identify the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the asset is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the asset is based */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the asset */,
  "last_trade_date" TEXT /* Last trade date of the asset */,
  "is_delisted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the asset is delisted */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company (if applicable) */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* CEO of the company (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device) used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being recommended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst making the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., buy, hold, sell) */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price for the asset */,
  "rationale" TEXT /* Rationale for the recommendation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the recommendation (e.g., 1 to 5) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_recommendations_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
